summary.medium_cause_summary: BAESSESB: source PDF artifact (last SP term value displaced after Total CUs) — identical in nature to BSSWE_C from cs_ug rollout

sp_format_findings.note: The 2-column/3-column split follows the licensure vs. educational-studies program distinction within education_ba. Both formats already supported. No branching needed.

structural_subtype_note: education_ba contains two distinct subtypes: (1) teacher licensure programs (BAELED: 2-column SP, Clinical Experiences + Student Teaching AoS groups, no Capstone); (2) educational studies programs (BAES*: 3-column SP with Term, subject-specific AoS group sets, no Clinical/Student Teaching sections). Both subtypes parse correctly with the current parser.

verdict.rationale: 5/5 guides parsed successfully. 4 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM (source artifact). No parser changes needed. Both education_ba subtypes (licensure and educational studies) handled correctly by existing logic. Safe to proceed to full education_ba rollout.
